events.name: Beach Day
events.details: Kick off the celebration with a relaxed day at Balsamar Beach. Come ready for sun, sand, and surf — bring swimwear, sunscreen, and a towel. Lunch and drinks will be available for purchase.

events.name: Night out in San Salvador
events.details: Join us for a fun night out at the place where we first met! Come dressed to dance and enjoy a taste of the city's nightlife.

events.name: Holy Hour
events.details: A quiet hour of prayer and reflection at the lake before the festivities begin. All are welcome to join.

events.name: Welcome Dinner
events.details: Gather with family and friends for a welcome dinner at the Lake House overlooking Lago de Coatepeque. Enjoy some pupusas, drinks, and the company of loved ones as we celebrate the weekend ahead.

events.name: Wedding Ceremony
events.description: Basilica of Our Lady of Guadalupe
events.details: The heart of the weekend — join us as we exchange vows at the Basilica of Our Lady of Guadalupe. Please arrive 30 minutes early to be seated before the ceremony begins.

events.name: The Reception
events.details: Celebrate with us into the night at Cajamarca. Dinner, dancing, and plenty of surprises await. Formal attire requested.
